The plant's classification is further divided into the genus Koanophyllon and the specific epithet droserolepis. Koanophyllon droserolepis is a member of the tribe Heliantheae, within the subfamily Asteroideae. Further research into the plant's classification may provide additional information about its taxonomic relationships.
